what_it_does: A channel attachment metadata file that records a typed link between an attachment and a board item in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
target uses a board:// URI pointing to item-a2c9902b
standouts: The target is a board item referenced by a board:// URI
The file is essentially an empty metadata stub
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata
Stores attachments as markdown files in a channel-memory directory
References external artifacts with a custom board:// URI scheme
concerns: No payload or explanatory body content
The referenced board item cannot be verified from this file alone
No author or edit history is recorded
notes: A metadata stub that records a link between a dragnet-development channel attachment and board item item-a2c9902b.
questions: What content does board item item-a2c9902b contain?

intention_signals: It seems to be trying to capture a cross-reference between a channel attachment and a specific board item for the dragnet-development project.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme inside an attachment metadata file to point to a board item.
contribution: A timestamped, typed association between a channel attachment and a specific board item, preserving the channel-board relationship.
